ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the date */,
  "money" REAL /* Total money traded on the date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Number of trades */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "50_day_moving_average" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "200_day_moving_average" REAL /* 200-day moving average */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the stock's information */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the markets table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the market */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the market */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the market's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
